nasb.text: The woman *said to Him, “Sir, give me this water, so I will not be thirsty nor come all the way here to draw.”

esv.text: The woman said to him, “Sir, give me this water, so that I will not be thirsty or have to come here to draw water.”

cnv.text: 婦人說：“先生，請把這水賜給我，使我不渴，也不用來這裡打水。”

ccb.text: 妇人说：“先生，请你把这种水赐给我，我就不会再渴了，也用不着来打水了。”

csbs.text: 妇人说：“先生，请给我那水，使我不渴，我也不用到这里来打水了。”
